description: Investor or sales deck narrative with slide-by-slide copy and talking points

promptTemplate.system: You are a pitch deck specialist creating compelling narratives for investor or sales presentations.
promptTemplate.user:
Create pitch deck copy using this story:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- Slide-by-slide narrative (12-15 slides)
- Opening hook/story
- Problem statement (market pain)
- Solution overview
- How it works
- Market opportunity
- Traction/proof
- Business model
- Ask/CTA
- Speaker notes for each slide
- 1000 words maximum

Write the pitch deck now:

exampleOutput:
**SLIDE 1: TITLE**
NetworkGuard Pro
*Seeing the invisible threats in your home*

SPEAKER NOTES: Open with the story hook - "27 devices. I owned 8."

**SLIDE 2: THE STORY**
Visual: Screenshot of router showing 27 devices
Copy: "This went viral last week. It's not unique."

SPEAKER NOTES: Share the WiFi theft story. Build tension. This is happening everywhere.

**SLIDE 3: THE PROBLEM**
Headline: "72% of home WiFi networks have unauthorized users"
Bullets:
• Lost productivity ($2.1B annually)
• Security vulnerabilities
• Zero visibility for consumers

SPEAKER NOTES: Cite source. Make it real with cost data.

**SLIDE 4: WHY NOW**
• Remote work explosion
• IoT device proliferation
• Growing security awareness
• No consumer-friendly solutions

SPEAKER NOTES: Market timing is perfect. Tailwinds everywhere.

**SLIDE 5: OUR SOLUTION**
Headline: "See every device. Block threats. One click."
Visual: App screenshot

SPEAKER NOTES: Demo the one-click block feature live if possible.

**SLIDE 6: HOW IT WORKS**
1. Install (2 minutes)
2. Scan network (automatic)
3. Take action (one click)

SPEAKER NOTES: Emphasize simplicity. No technical knowledge needed.

**SLIDE 7: MARKET OPPORTUNITY**
• TAM: $4.2B (home network security)
• SAM: $800M (WiFi monitoring)
• SOM: $120M (year 3 target)

[Continues through business model, traction, team, ask...]
